register.title: Create Account
register.passwordHelp: At least 10 characters with a letter, digit, and symbol.
register.captchaFallback: Security check unavailable. Please try again later.

login.title: Log In
login.pendingVerify: Check your email and click the verification link before logging in.
login.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully. Log in with your new password.
login.passwordChangedSuccess: Password changed. Please log in with your new password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.expiredToken: This verification link has expired. Please register again.

passwordReset.requestDescription: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
passwordReset.sentDescription: If an account with that email exists, we sent a password reset link.
passwordReset.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or missing.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.warning: Changing your password will sign you out of all active sessions.

changeEmail.title: Change Email
changeEmail.sentDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to confirm your new email.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.revokeConfirm: This will immediately sign out that device.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, including organizations you created, projects, agents, and conversations will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.confirm: I understand this action is permanent
deleteAccount.finalConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.blocked: You must transfer ownership of the following organizations before deleting your account:

common.passwordPolicy: At least 10 characters with a letter, digit, and symbol.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.domainDenied: This email domain is not allowed.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.weakPassword: Password does not meet the requirements.
errors.emailUnverified: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.lockout: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.resetRateLimit: Too many reset requests. Please try again later.

validation.emailFormat: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 10 characters.
validation.passwordSame: New password must be different from current password.
validation.emailSame: New email must be different from current email.
